reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar para descansar. Excelente atención y buena comida. En lo posible haga reservaciones para el festival de fines de febrero ya que no se consigue hospedaje en toda la villa.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place to relax. Excellent service and good food. If possible, make reservations for the festival at the end of February, as lodging is scarce throughout the village.
